differentials.name: Type I (postmenopausal) osteoporosis =  accelerated trabecular bone resorption ← estrogen deficiency
differentials.raw: Type I (postmenopausal) osteoporosis =  accelerated trabecular bone resorption ← estrogen deficiency

context: Osteoporosis =  reduced bone mass of normal composition secondary to (a)  osteoclastic resorption (85%): trabecular, endosteal, intracortical, subperiosteal (b) osteocytic resorption (15%) Prevalence:  7% of all women aged 35-40 years; 12% for males + females aged 50-79 years; ◊  Most common of all metabolic bone disorders; 14 million worldwide by Classification: (a)  Primary / involutional osteoporosis ← cumulative bone loss as people age and undergo sex hormone changes
